researchPeriod.totalText: The project duration is 1 year (1 October 2026 - 31 September 2027)

funding.perYearPerProjectText: The maximum budget available for the Korean side of a project is KRW 100,000,000 for a 1-year project (Luxembourg side max 70,000 EUR)
funding.totalScaleText: Total budget available in Korea is KRW 300,000,000; total in Luxembourg 210,000 EUR (together about 400,000 EUR)
funding.numAwardsText: A maximum of 3 joint projects will be funded

eligibility.employmentEvidence: The call is open to researchers from all eligible research institutions in Luxembourg and Korea. ; Korean applicants should abide by the applicable laws and regulations of the Ministry of Science and ICT (MSIT)
eligibility.targetSummary: 룩셈부르크와 한국 각 1인 이상의 PI가 참여하는 양자기술 국제공동연구(JRP). 한국측은 MSIT 관련 법령을 준수하는 모든 적격 연구기관 소속 연구자가 대상이며, 전임/비전임 여부에 관한 명시적 규정은 없음.

evidenceQuotes: The project duration is 1 year (1 October 2026 - 31 September 2027)
The maximum budget available for the Korean side of a project is KRW 100,000,000 for a 1-year project.
The total budget available in Korea is KRW 300,000,000.
A maximum of 3 joint projects will be funded
The call is open to researchers from all eligible research institutions in Luxembourg and Korea.
